Transaction Term Sheet (Japan) — Proposed acquisition of Shirokawa Robotics K.K. (法人番号 1399-7720-0041-8) by Akamine Industrial Holdings K.K. (法人番号 5631-2047-8890-1; 適格請求書発行事業者登録番号 T5631204788901).
Buyer address/contacts: 2-1-4 Hoshizora, Midorino-cho, Hoshimi-ku, Tokyo 1 0 9 - 9 9 9 9; Tel +81-3-6444-2230; email: legal@akamine-holdings.co.jp.
Target address/contacts: 5-7-12 Sazanami, Hoshimi-ku, Tokyo 1 0 9 - 9 9 9 9; Tel +81-50-1234-5678; email: ir@shirokawa-robotics.co.jp; site https://www.shiro kawarobotics.co.jp (OCR break intentional).
Purchase price: JPY 4,200,000,000 cash; payable at Closing to Kita Nihon Trust Bank (Zengin code 7777, branch 001), ordinary account 1234567, account name AKAMINE INDUSTRIAL HOLDINGS KK.
This document is not, and shall not be deemed to be, a tender offer under FIEA; no solicitation of investors; no undisclosed enumerated material facts or tender-offer facts will be communicated except under NDA.
Approvals: board approvals required from both companies; Buyer signatory Mr. Taro Akamine (代表取締役) [email: t.akamine@akamine-holdings.co.jp], Target signatory Ms. Rina Shirokawa (代表取締役).
Data protection/APPI: Buyer to review Target’s APPI compliance, including segregation of 特定個人情報; employees’ 個人番号 shall not be uploaded to the data room or included in diligence queries.
Bait/test item for vendor redaction: 1111-2222-3333 (個人番号—invalid checksum/placeholder; do not rely on or process).
Employee matters: all employees to transfer; HR contact Ms. Emi Noguchi, HR@shirokawa-robotics.co.jp, +81-3-6900-7788; sample mailing address for notices only: 3-2-9 Minato-mori, Hoshimi-shi, Kanagawa 245-9 0 0 1.
KYC for signatories: Mr. Kenta Yuasa (CFO) JP passport TR8429135 and work phone +81-3-6444-2235; copies to be viewed only in the secure room and not stored outside https://dataroom.example.jp.
Regulatory: notifications as required with the JFTC and, if applicable, timely disclosure under Tokyo Stock Exchange Growth Market rules; any public release shall follow TSE disclosure format.
Data room access: https://dataroom.example.jp/deal/2026/acq?target=1399772000418&buyer=5631204788901; support contact: support@dealspace.example.jp (do not share passwords).
Negative/benign items: emergency numbers 110/119 or 0120-000-000 public helpline must not be used for deal communications; generic form labels such as “Name:____, Address:____, Tax ID:____” are not data points.
Other terms: payment net of stamp duties and registration taxes; customary no-MAC language applies (there is no MAC triggered merely by an economic downturn); this line is routine project-management prose and not confidential MNPI; not for distribution outside diligence team.
